name: Bill Clinton's Chicken Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat 2 tablespoons of oil in a skillet.
2. Remove seeds from the green chilies and chop them.
3. Sauté the chilies with minced garlic in the oil until they become limp.
4. Drain the tomatoes and reserve half a cup of liquid.
5. Add the diced tomatoes, salt, oregano, and reserved tomato liquid to the skillet.
6. Simmer uncovered for about 30 minutes or until thickened.
7. Remove the sauce from the skillet and set aside.
8. Combine the shredded chicken with sour cream, grated cheddar cheese, and remaining salt.
9. Heat 1/3 cup of oil in a separate pan.
10. Dip the corn tortillas in the hot oil until they become limp, then drain well on paper towels.
11. Fill each tortilla with the chicken mixture.
12. Roll up the enchiladas seam side down.
13. Arrange the rolled enchiladas in a 9 x 13 x 2 inch baking dish, seam side down.
14. Pour the chili sauce over the enchiladas.
15. Bake at 250°F for about 20 minutes until heated through.
